india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday
india_trends.summary: Domestic equity benchmarks ended marginally higher after four sessions of losses, supported by gains in metal, energy and consumer stocks. Analysts cautioned that bearish technical indicators and resistance near key levels could keep markets volatile, while broader sentiment remained tilted toward s

india_trends.title: Zydus to acquire US cancer drug company Assertio for $166.4 million in all-cash deal
india_trends.summary: The deal is the latest in a string of overseas acquisitions by the Ahmedabad drugmaker as it looks to diversify and strengthen its specialty plays in regulated markets.

india_trends.title: Ahmedabad to Dholera in 48 minutes: High-Speed double line project to boost connectivity
india_trends.summary: The launch of a modern semi-fast rail link between Ahmedabad and Dholera is set to transform travel in Gujarat. With an investment of Rs 20,667 crore, this line will shrink travel duration to just 48 minutes, making daily work commutes and same-day excursions a breeze.

india_trends.title: India targets $1 trillion exports as FTAs now cover two-thirds of global trade: Piyush Goyal
india_trends.summary: India's FTA network now covers over two-thirds of global trade across 38 economies, with five more pacts set to go live within a year. The country hit a record $863 billion in exports in 2025-26.

india_trends.title: Zaggle sets aside $25 million for acquisitions in FY27, eyes US deal for international foray
india_trends.summary: Zaggle, the innovative spend management platform, is earmarking between $20-25 million for strategic acquisitions. With ambitions set on the US market, the company plans to acquire one firm in America and potentially one or two in India. This initiative not only signifies Zaggle's robust expansion s

india_trends.title: Bharti Airtel board approves re-appointment of Sunil Bharti Mittal as chairman for 5 years
india_trends.summary: Bharti Airtel's board approved the re-appointment of Sunil Bharti Mittal as Chairman for a term of five years, effective 1 October 2026. Nisaba Godrej was also re-appointed as an Independent Director for a second term. Both appointments are pending shareholder approval.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy SAIL, Hindustan Copper on Thursday for gains up to 9%
india_trends.summary: Nifty snapped its four-session losing streak with modest gains led by metals, energy and consumer stocks, though bearish momentum persisted technically. Analysts identified SAIL and Hindustan Copper as promising buy opportunities, citing breakout patterns, improving momentum indicators and favourabl

india_trends.title: DLF ends FY26 debt-free with strong cash, reports slight dip in sales
india_trends.summary: DLF reported stable quarterly profit and strong annual earnings growth supported by healthy sales bookings, rising rental income and robust cash generation. The realty major ended FY26 debt-free in its development business, strengthened shareholder returns and maintained confidence amid sustained ho

india_trends.title: RBI eases rules for outward remittances; drops prior approval for non-bank entities
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has eased rules for non-bank entities facilitating outward remittances. Prior approval from the RBI is no longer required for these tie-ups. Authorised Dealer banks will now be solely responsible for compliance and customer verification. Customers will receive clear informa

india_trends.title: DLF Q4 Results: Cons PAT falls marginally to Rs 1,269 crore, revenue plunges 42%; Rs 8/share dividend announced
india_trends.summary: DLF reported a marginal decline in quarterly profit as revenue dropped sharply amid lower project recognition. Strong collections, healthy bookings and rising rental income supported performance. The realty major maintained robust cash generation, improved annual profitability and recommended a divi

india_trends.title: DLF's sales bookings drop in FY26
india_trends.summary: Top developers Godrej Properties, Lodha, Prestige Estates and DLF reported cumulative sales bookings of ₹1.04 trillion in FY26, a new milestone for the real estate sector.

india_trends.title: USD 1 trillion exports target for this year: Piyush Goyal
india_trends.summary: Aiming high, India is embarking on a mission to achieve USD 1 trillion in exports this fiscal year, following a stellar achievement of USD 863.11 billion in the previous year. To catalyze this growth, the government is proactively engaging in negotiations for Free Trade Agreements, and while several

india_trends.title: Indian Stock Market Ends Higher After Volatile Trade, Nifty Breaks 3-Day Losing Streak - UdaipurTimes.com
india_trends.summary: Indian Stock Market Ends Higher After Volatile Trade, Nifty Breaks 3-Day Losing Streak    UdaipurTimes.com

india_trends.title: Sebi plans bond distributor model to deepen retail debt market
india_trends.summary: The regulator plans to create a specialised category of bond distributors, mirroring the mutual fund model, to simplify KYC and transactions for retail debt investors, Sebi whole time member Amarjeet Singh said on Wednesday.

india_trends.title: WazirX launches crypto futures trading with lowest fees in the industry
india_trends.summary: WazirX has launched crypto Futures trading in India with the lowest fees among exchanges. The platform offers a maker fee of 0.02% and a taker fee of 0.04%, with no minimum trading volume.

india_trends.title: Tata Motors turns cautious on capex amid West Asia war headwinds
india_trends.summary: Tata Motors is proceeding with caution on its spending plans. The West Asia crisis has created several challenges for the company. Despite these headwinds, Tata Motors plans to maintain its capital expenditure of around Rs 3,000 crore for FY27. The domestic commercial vehicle industry is still expec

india_trends.title: Tata Motors cautions on FY27 growth as war woes weigh on industry
india_trends.summary: The commercial vehicle major expects single-digit industry growth this fiscal year as geopolitical tensions and rising fuel costs threaten to hurt demand.

india_trends.title: Closing monitoring effects of West Asia conflict: TVS Motor Company CEO
india_trends.summary: TVS Motor Company is closely watching the West Asia conflict's impact. The company faces rising commodity prices and supply chain issues. Initiatives are underway to cut costs and improve product mix. May is expected to be better, with strong Q1 growth anticipated, surpassing the industry.

india_trends.title: Profit booking limits paper gold rally post duty hike
india_trends.summary: The overnight hike in import duty on Wednesday drives ETF holders to book profits, limiting the rally to 6%.
